items.description: A focused checkout card for Wave, MTN, Orange Money, and SPI.

items.title: Checkout Summary Card
items.description: A dark checkout summary inspired by Lomi hosted checkout.

items.title: Payment Status Card

items.title: Pricing Table

items.description: A compact invoice and receipt table for customer billing surfaces.

items.description: Track usage limits for checkout sessions, webhooks, payouts, or subscriptions.
